Ruins of Old Guk - froglok slaves for the win!
QuoteReply
# May 05 2025 at 1:45 PM Rating: Decent
Drazzminius
Scholar
188 posts
Followed the guidance below and it worked like a champ - basically the slaves spawn as quickly as you can kill them

/loc 920, -605, -205
____________________________
Mikaal Drazzminius
Tier'Dal Necromancer
Necrotalk Admin
EQ Traders Super Moderator
EQ Magelo Advisor/Moderator
Rodcet Nife by Birth / Quellious by Merger / Povar by Re-Merger
▲ Page top
Roughly 10% drop rate
QuoteReply
# Jan 25 2022 at 4:05 PM Rating: Good
randomuser420
Sage
78 posts
I just killed 512 frogs in the slave area of Lower Guk and got 49 froggy bloods. Bard playing ae dmg song, no moving or hitting attack required :)
▲ Page top
Froglok Blood farming statistics
QuoteReply
# Nov 17 2021 at 5:46 AM Rating: Decent
MasterFalconer
2 posts
Some statistics from farming 350 Froglok Bloods in the dead-side slave pit of lower Guk.
There are 8 slaves in the pit, each on a 30 sec respawn timer. So there is no down time. They pop faster than you can kill them.
It took 4980 mobs to get 350 bloods. This worked out to be a mean of 14.23 kills per blood looted.
The median number of kills between looting a blood was 9 with a the most frequent interval (mode) of 5 kills per blood.
Seventeen times I got back-to-back bloods.
The longest interval between looting a blood was 81 kills with several in the 60's.
Tracking these statistics helped me persist in the mind-numbing repetition of farming these bloods, along with setting up killing and looting hot keys.

▲ Page top
farm
QuoteReply
# Apr 22 2006 at 6:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591813456245
59 posts
best place to farm these?
▲ Page top
farm
QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2011 at 4:16 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1655684310748
Scholar
25 posts
The best place to farm these is in Lower Guk on the Dead side. Go to the prison area just after the safe hall, (your first left), there will be 3 undead frogs overlooking 8 living ones. The living ones are all level 2-4 and have a respawn of 30 seconds. Enjoy.
▲ Page top
farm
QuoteReply
# Dec 22 2016 at 8:30 PM Rating: Decent
kindablandname
Scholar
17 posts
Just commenting to say thanks! This was a great spot to farm froglok bloods. :D I spent a short while in Innothule Swamp and got 1 blood out of a few dozen frogloks and was feeling discouraged, moved to UGuk and had similar results. Then I swapped to the froglok slaves area in LGuk and it took maybe 10 minutes of obliterating frogloks with a pet to get a stack or so. Very easy!
▲ Page top
farm
QuoteReply
# Jan 25 2021 at 12:32 AM Rating: Default
Vigrmot
View User Forum
211 posts
It does occur. the drop rate aint that fast now though. just be aware :)
▲ Page top
farm
QuoteReply
# Jan 11 2009 at 1:44 AM Rating: Excellent
Rhykar
View User Forum
Guru
235 posts
Don't know yet, but I do know that the froglok village in Swamp of No Hope is NOT the place to go. Blew up the entire village in 1 quick cast and not a single blood dropped. Also, I would say Sebilis isn't the best bet either. Cleared from top down to Disco 2 twice and top down to Chef twice and ended up with a net total of 6 bloods. On to check on more places. Hoping Upper Guk isn't gonna be the best bet...
____________________________
Nytera Nytemare
Danarium Targaryen
▲ Page top
farm
QuoteReply
# Jan 11 2009 at 2:32 AM Rating: Excellent
Rhykar
View User Forum
Guru
235 posts
Well after gathering some numbers... there are roughly 100 frogs in the upper portion of Sebilis. In 3 complete clearings (clearing them all before respawn) I have gotten 9 bloods total. So based on these numbers, there is a 3% chance of getting a blood from the frogs in sebilis. I'm assuming Guk is probably the place to get these, but until I get my wood elf crown on my wizard, that is a no no :(

Best of luck to others who farm these.
____________________________
Nytera Nytemare
Danarium Targaryen
▲ Page top
worth
QuoteReply
# Nov 15 2005 at 11:12 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1719792988335
679 posts
Froglok Blood sells for 0 plat 1 gold 9 silver 0 copper to bazaar vendor Sateal Deirosap when offered by level 2 human monk with 143 cha.... Current price in the bazaar ranges from 45 to 200 plat...

What For
QuoteReply
# Aug 21 2005 at 3:10 AM Rating: Decent
Silvercheif
Scholar
64 posts
This is also used to make Essence of Gukta Potion for illusion of a Froglok
▲ Page top
What For?
QuoteReply
# Dec 03 2001 at 4:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772374283
2 posts
What is it used for?
▲ Page top
RE: What For?
QuoteReply
# Dec 04 2001 at 12:06 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591772488061
14 posts
Froglok blood is combined with Sarnak blood,Iksar blood and bloodwater to make Scale Temper. The Scale Temper is then used by the "Lizzies" to make their racial armour.
▲ Page top
RE: What For?
QuoteReply
# Nov 10 2002 at 5:38 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592251071989
289 posts
also used for lizard blood temper for cazic thule armor- Tae Ew Plate Bracer

Lizard Blood Temper (1) Brewing, 153 Trivial
for it u combine:

Thul Tae Ew Blood (1) Dropped
Scale Temper (1) Brewing, 135 Trivial
Sarnak Blood (1) Dropped
Iksar Blood (1) Dropped
Froglok Blood (1) Dropped
Flask of Bloodwater

the recipie above is jus for the temper used in this:

Tae Ew Plate Bracer
+19 Armor Class +3 Stamina +1 Wisdom +1 Intelligence +35 Hit Points +25 Mana 5.00 Weight
Classes: CLR, PAL, SHD, BRD, WAR Races: All



Edited, Sun Nov 10 05:18:22 2002
